Flat concept inventory:
- Confidence Estimation and Calibration in LLMs | papers: d65ce2b8300541414bfe51d03906fca72e93523c; d4691aef27ae3c768b90c34ca5d8521d202eb47c; 3b656bba99dbcf6c6d8fd764d53ea64cd38c7050; 14d0489047a1390434e7ea454e7e5165d9721ae3; 96c90ab340b2823a0040cd64b25d1d32af807994; ad934a9344f68fcc0b9aa704102aa48c39c5b591; 6920de816acd201aadc0de51cf0fa62fa92bb0cc; 5424e311319c58847b4c690d5c91090e3b6a4ac3; 507465f8d46489a68a527cb5304d76bdb6c31ed9; f406aceba4f29cc7cfbe7edb2f52f01374486589; 89c3bd70ad33c4f8832f00ab98872b77861ee0ec; 142ebbf4760145f591166bde2564ac70c001e927; 405f8f5f1c6df1b3343c812832479aad5180b65f; 94b6f6822f364cf7b1a3a9984667c009e2ec6a65; d77c78c9439422ed88e754f776a642d43a8acb66; 8f7297454d7f44365b9bcda5ebb9439a43daf5e6; 7c1707db9aafd209aa93db3251e7ebd593d55876; df9981b9bbfc619652e84cd0eefa595274da2fef; 57e849d0de13ed5f91d086936296721d4ff75a75; ffe9a70445f99516aa3c86651f9121c84b1b78cc; d785f543f7a344fcec7ccbe55089a7f782e32bd7; 3ca35c7df229549997491787d93c01de29af206d; 2476832edb11cb3de46587f55e270d6df328b32d; 296cad46f56329843ded4a8b7d7633c9d436f113; 891edceb78a274b0c2494d8176bc4d6f6e3f9cbc; 58af2d4fcca54c14334d1efd975554b4eb78cd4d; 374dd173491a59a10bbb2b3519ebcfe3649f529d; 1fa4469e5bc5d096572902fe14b0d66078a24c47; 28a7ced384549eaae74ea9ad3ee21189a0625afe; 6a483cd1cbecd66150c9bbcd01606723950281bc; 6d951d939d3f27054215f2606a0cf89ed21550e9; 56fa0b9cba4d9aee5ccc327365b3b3a721031c69; 6af460d34bfc8e955e43fbe15cedcf329b48bc19; db1aa71314016e12e115fbe449a688f523e52e77; 1827dd28ef866eaeb929ddf4bcfa492880aba4c7; 9386242a9ad5c1a15023043ef63d45e42ceac546; 67fa2f2072cca1071ed2c820d6a7f50de6ea2ff3; cb693ce346f44e6b89ee814c6bb9f0e5cc2fa9d2; 88884b8806262a4095036041e3567d450dba39f7; 86d0d3855f94105e25d81cab9f3d269c6062a9c4; 196ee3bf7724cd6b01972a7eeb4b4416a781b0ee

- Methods | papers: 5424e311319c58847b4c690d5c91090e3b6a4ac3; 507465f8d46489a68a527cb5304d76bdb6c31ed9; f406aceba4f29cc7cfbe7edb2f52f01374486589; 89c3bd70ad33c4f8832f00ab98872b77861ee0ec; 142ebbf4760145f591166bde2564ac70c001e927; 405f8f5f1c6df1b3343c812832479aad5180b65f; 94b6f6822f364cf7b1a3a9984667c009e2ec6a65; d77c78c9439422ed88e754f776a642d43a8acb66; 8f7297454d7f44365b9bcda5ebb9439a43daf5e6; ad934a9344f68fcc0b9aa704102aa48c39c5b591; 7c1707db9aafd209aa93db3251e7ebd593d55876; df9981b9bbfc619652e84cd0eefa595274da2fef; 57e849d0de13ed5f91d086936296721d4ff75a75; 96c90ab340b2823a0040cd64b25d1d32af807994; ffe9a70445f99516aa3c86651f9121c84b1b78cc; d785f543f7a344fcec7ccbe55089a7f782e32bd7; 3ca35c7df229549997491787d93c01de29af206d; 2476832edb11cb3de46587f55e270d6df328b32d; 296cad46f56329843ded4a8b7d7633c9d436f113; 891edceb78a274b0c2494d8176bc4d6f6e3f9cbc; 58af2d4fcca54c14334d1efd975554b4eb78cd4d; 374dd173491a59a10bbb2b3519ebcfe3649f529d; 1fa4469e5bc5d096572902fe14b0d66078a24c47; 28a7ced384549eaae74ea9ad3ee21189a0625afe; 6a483cd1cbecd66150c9bbcd01606723950281bc; 6d951d939d3f27054215f2606a0cf89ed21550e9; 56fa0b9cba4d9aee5ccc327365b3b3a721031c69
- Generation | papers: 5424e311319c58847b4c690d5c91090e3b6a4ac3; 507465f8d46489a68a527cb5304d76bdb6c31ed9; f406aceba4f29cc7cfbe7edb2f52f01374486589; 89c3bd70ad33c4f8832f00ab98872b77861ee0ec; 142ebbf4760145f591166bde2564ac70c001e927; 405f8f5f1c6df1b3343c812832479aad5180b65f; 94b6f6822f364cf7b1a3a9984667c009e2ec6a65; d77c78c9439422ed88e754f776a642d43a8acb66; 8f7297454d7f44365b9bcda5ebb9439a43daf5e6; ad934a9344f68fcc0b9aa704102aa48c39c5b591; 7c1707db9aafd209aa93db3251e7ebd593d55876; df9981b9bbfc619652e84cd0eefa595274da2fef; 57e849d0de13ed5f91d086936296721d4ff75a75; 96c90ab340b2823a0040cd64b25d1d32af807994; ffe9a70445f99516aa3c86651f9121c84b1b78cc; d785f543f7a344fcec7ccbe55089a7f782e32bd7; 3ca35c7df229549997491787d93c01de29af206d; 2476832edb11cb3de46587f55e270d6df328b32d; 296cad46f56329843ded4a8b7d7633c9d436f113; 891edceb78a274b0c2494d8176bc4d6f6e3f9cbc; 58af2d4fcca54c14334d1efd975554b4eb78cd4d; 374dd173491a59a10bbb2b3519ebcfe3649f529d; 1fa4469e5bc5d096572902fe14b0d66078a24c47
- Estimation | papers: 5424e311319c58847b4c690d5c91090e3b6a4ac3; 507465f8d46489a68a527cb5304d76bdb6c31ed9; f406aceba4f29cc7cfbe7edb2f52f01374486589; 89c3bd70ad33c4f8832f00ab98872b77861ee0ec; 142ebbf4760145f591166bde2564ac70c001e927; 405f8f5f1c6df1b3343c812832479aad5180b65f; 94b6f6822f364cf7b1a3a9984667c009e2ec6a65; d77c78c9439422ed88e754f776a642d43a8acb66; 8f7297454d7f44365b9bcda5ebb9439a43daf5e6; ad934a9344f68fcc0b9aa704102aa48c39c5b591; 7c1707db9aafd209aa93db3251e7ebd593d55876; df9981b9bbfc619652e84cd0eefa595274da2fef; 57e849d0de13ed5f91d086936296721d4ff75a75
